info.name: Vital Team API
info.description:
Read and administer team-level resources on the Junction (Vital) platform: get team metadata, search users, manage Svix webhook portal URLs, list/check team configuration, and access team-level introspection of historical pulls and resource availability.

Contact Support:
 Name: Junction (Vital) Support

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
